author: Oscar Gonzalez Tur
description: Convert Swagger/OpenAPI JSON files to Swagger-style Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Oscar Gonzalez Tur
manifest.description: Convert Swagger/OpenAPI JSON files to Swagger-style Markdown.
manifest.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown

name: Swagger JSON to Markdown

releases.author: Krontur
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fixed recursive schema references to avoid infinite expansion.
- Improved rendering of rich HTML descriptions and structural headings.
- Extracted embedded HTML/Markdown description tables out of schema property tables.
- Improved description table layout for static PDF export, including five- and six-column tables.
- Removed CSS `:has()` selectors for better Obsidian performance.
- Removed deprecated Obsidian slider tooltip usage.
- Hardened TypeScript safety around converter API helpers.
- Updated `sanitize-html` to `2.17.4` to address GHSA-rpr9-rxv7-x643.
- Updated documentation.
releases.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.1.3

releases.author: Krontur
releases.description:
## Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.2

Patch release focused on Obsidian community plugin review compliance and release packaging.

### Changed
- Updated minimum Obsidian app version to 1.4.0.
- Cleaned bundled CSS to avoid Obsidian review warnings.
- Removed unsupported/flagged print CSS properties.
- Removed `!important` usage from bundled styles.
- Added GitHub Actions release workflow support for artifact attestations.

### Verification
- Passed lint.
- Passed test suite.
- Passed production build.
releases.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.2

releases.author: Krontur
releases.description:
Patch release for correct Obsidian plugin packaging.

Assets for manual installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Swagger JSON to Markdown 1.0.1
